title: deparia × nanakuraensis
intro: Deparia × nanakuraensis, also known as the Nanakura-Enoki fern, is a rare, hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Deparia genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues due to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Deparia × nanakuraensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to create teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
